LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.li.descrip: I had to clean Whitespring propaganda. I did take a quick peek. Maybe it's not all lies?
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.li.label: cleaned Whitespring propaganda
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.li.descripti: We will show the Whitespring Enclave what freedom means.
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.li.label: joined the Brotherhood
